2603.18782.title: Points-to-3D: Structure-Aware 3D Generation with Point Cloud Priors
2603.18782.paper_summary: Recent progress in 3D generation has been driven largely by models conditioned on images or text, while readily available 3D priors are still underused. In many real-world scenarios, the visible-region point cloud are easy to obtain from active sensors such as LiDAR or from feed-forward predictors like VGGT, offering explicit geometric constraints that current methods fail to exploit. In this work, we introduce Points-to-3D, a diffusion-based framework that leverages point cloud priors for geometry-controllable 3D asset and scene generation. Built on a latent 3D diffusion model TRELLIS, Points-to-3D first replaces pure-noise sparse structure latent initialization with a point cloud priors tailored input formulation.A structure inpainting network, trained within the TRELLIS framework on task-specific data designed to learn global structural inpainting, is then used for inference with a staged sampling strategy (structural inpainting followed by boundary refinement), completing the global geometry while preserving the visible regions of the input priors.In practice, Points-to-3D can take either accurate point-cloud priors or VGGT-estimated point clouds from single images as input. Experiments on both objects and scene scenarios consistently demonstrate superior performance over state-of-the-art baselines in terms of rendering quality and geometric fidelity, highlighting the effectiveness of explicitly embedding point-cloud priors for achieving more accurate and structurally controllable 3D generation.
2603.18782.paper_summary_zh: 最近在3D生成方面的進展主要是由基於圖像或文本的模型驅動，而現成的3D先驗知識仍然未被充分利用。在許多現實世界的場景中，從主動傳感器（如LiDAR）或像VGGT這樣的前饋預測器獲取可見區域的點雲是相對容易的，這提供了當前方法未能利用的明確幾何約束。在這項工作中，我們介紹了Points-to-3D，這是一個基於擴散的框架，利用點雲先驗知識進行幾何可控的3D資產和場景生成。Points-to-3D建立在潛在的3D擴散模型TRELLIS之上，首先用量身定制的點雲先驗輸入公式替換純噪聲稀疏結構的潛在初始化。然後，使用在TRELLIS框架內訓練的結構修補網絡，該網絡基於設計用於學習全局結構修補的任務特定數據進行推斷，並採用分階取樣策略（結構修補後進行邊界細化），在保留輸入先驗的可見區域的同時完成全局幾何。在實踐中，Points-to-3D可以將準確的點雲先驗或從單個圖像估算的VGGT點雲作為輸入。對物體和場景場景的實驗一致地顯示出在渲染質量和幾何真實性方面優於最先進的基準，突顯了明確嵌入點雲先驗以實現更準確和結構可控的3D生成的有效性。
2603.18782.author: Jiatong Xia et.al.
2603.18782.authors: Jiatong Xia, Zicheng Duan, Anton van den Hengel, Lingqiao Liu
